title: daucus microcarpus
intro: Daucus microcarpus, also known as wild carrot or beach carrot, is a small annual or biennial herbaceous plant belonging to the parsley family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which contain a compound called sesquiterpene lactone that has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Daucus microcarpus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Daucus microcarpus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, with the seeds often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of conditions.
